steps.title: Spot the contradiction between the two disturbed-water studies
steps.content: Laurent found no correlation in wastewater-impacted waters, contradicting Bergstrom's finding in urban-development-disturbed waters (correlation present, like undisturbed waters). This divergence undermines the hypothesis that the association is “particular to undisturbed waters.”

steps.title: Recognize that C captures the implication
steps.content:
The correct response concludes that wastewater's effect should not be taken as representative of all human disturbances — the direct logical implication when one disturbance type breaks the association and another preserves it.

A, B, and D each make claims unsupported by the passage. That confirms C is correct.
